description: Guided reuse recommendations for Tutorputor and FlashIt products, suggesting reusable assets from PHR and Digital Marketing

tutorputor.description: AI-powered tutoring platform for personalized learning experiences

recommendedAssets.reuseReason: Tutorputor requires student/parent consent for data collection and AI tutoring features. The PHR consent panel provides a mature, healthcare-grade consent management UI with audit trail support.
recommendedAssets.adaptationRequired: Adapt healthcare-specific consent language to educational context (FERPA instead of HIPAA)

recommendedAssets.reuseReason: Tutorputor needs comprehensive audit logging for tutoring sessions, AI interactions, and content modifications. The PHR audit trail panel provides a proven pattern for displaying audit events with filtering and export capabilities.
recommendedAssets.adaptationRequired: Adapt healthcare audit events to educational audit events (tutoring sessions, content access, AI recommendations)

recommendedAssets.reuseReason: Tutorputor requires approval workflows for curriculum content, AI-generated materials, and tutor credentials. The DMOS approval queue provides a multi-stage approval pattern with audit trails.
recommendedAssets.adaptationRequired: Adapt marketing approval gates to educational content approval gates (curriculum review, educational standards compliance)

recommendedAssets.reuseReason: Tutorputor uses AI for personalized learning recommendations. The DMOS AI transparency panel provides a proven pattern for displaying AI decisions, confidence scores, and rationale to users.
recommendedAssets.adaptationRequired: Adapt marketing AI transparency to educational AI transparency (learning recommendations, content suggestions)

recommendedAssets.assetName: Retry and Dead Letter Queue Pattern
recommendedAssets.reuseReason: Tutorputor requires reliable message processing for tutoring session events, AI recommendations, and notifications. The DMOS retry/DLQ pattern provides production-grade resilience for async operations.
recommendedAssets.adaptationRequired: Minimal adaptation required - pattern is domain-agnostic

flashit.description: Flashcard learning platform with spaced repetition

recommendedAssets.reuseReason: FlashIt may need to export learning data in standard healthcare formats for research or integration with health education programs. The PHR FHIR validation gate provides schema validation for FHIR R4 resources.
recommendedAssets.adaptationRequired: Adapt to FlashIt's data model if exporting learning progress as FHIR observations

recommendedAssets.reuseReason: FlashIt requires multi-tenant isolation for educational institutions and individual learners. The PHR tenant-scoped repository pattern provides a proven pattern for tenant isolation with RBAC.
recommendedAssets.adaptationRequired: Minimal adaptation required - pattern is domain-agnostic

recommendedAssets.reuseReason: FlashIt requires dashboards for tracking learning campaigns, study goals, and user engagement. The DMOS campaign dashboard provides a proven pattern for displaying metrics, progress tracking, and goal completion.
recommendedAssets.adaptationRequired: Adapt marketing campaign metrics to learning campaign metrics (study sessions, card reviews, retention rates)

recommendedAssets.reuseReason: FlashIt may need to integrate with external learning management systems, calendar apps, or notification services. The DMOS connector workflow provides a pattern for external integrations with OAuth, retry, and DLQ.
recommendedAssets.adaptationRequired: Adapt marketing connectors to educational system connectors (LMS APIs, calendar APIs)

recommendedAssets.reuseReason: FlashIt may need emergency access for support staff to assist users with account issues or data recovery. The PHR break-glass workflow provides a proven pattern for emergency access with audit trails and notifications.
recommendedAssets.adaptationRequired: Adapt healthcare emergency access to educational support access (account recovery, data export)

adaptationProcess: Review source asset documentation and implementation
Assess compatibility with target product's tech stack
Create adaptation plan with effort estimation

maturityRequirements.experimental: Not recommended for production reuse without extensive testing
maturityRequirements.beta: May be reused with caution and additional testing
maturityRequirements.stable: Recommended for reuse with standard testing
maturityRequirements.hardened: Recommended for production reuse with minimal additional testing
maturityRequirements.production: Ready for production reuse with confidence

compatibilityScoring.high: Direct reuse with minimal adaptation required
compatibilityScoring.medium: Reuse with moderate adaptation and testing
compatibilityScoring.low: Significant adaptation required, consider building from scratch
